title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine. We can make it!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We can't loose to those three!!!

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: Too bad. You guys came close.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: He also has devil fruit power.

summary: Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.
